attributes.action: War in Iran should stop. US should be condemned. Dialogue is best & peaceful
attributes.additional_details: Innocent civilians are dying. Including women & children. Places are being attacked like hospitals etc. The world should be a peaceful place to travel in. Humans should bring harmony for each other.
attributes.background: Government should try to influence USA and Israel to stop the war in Iran. This has caused widespread disruption in the Middle East.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Withdraw involvement in war on Iran and seek diplomatic resolution" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761718
